seoTitle: Kurrajong Heights vs Kurri Kurri — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kurrajong Heights and Kurri Kurri. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kurrajong Heights vs Kurri Kurri: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kurrajong Heights and Kurri Kurri.
heading: Kurrajong Heights vs Kurri Kurri — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kurrajong Heights, New South Wales and Kurri Kurri, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kurri Kurri has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Kurrajong Heights (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kurrajong Heights or Kurri Kurri safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kurrajong Heights has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Kurri Kurri scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kurrajong Heights scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Kurri Kurri scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kurrajong Heights or Kurri Kurri?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kurri Kurri has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
